name: Zippy Kidney Bean Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, puree the beans to a coarse paste.
2. Add all of the other ingredients and blend well.
3. Serve at room temperature.
4. Makes about 2 3/4 cups of dip.
5. Suggested Dippers: Sirloin Steak, Celery, Jicama, Cabbage, Swiss Cheese
